meaning: 青海(位于中国西部,长江、黄河上游)
examples: When will Mark go to Qinghai?
How long will Mark stay in Qinghai?
I want to go to Qinghai Museum, but I am not sure how I can get there.
The Qaidam basin in Qinghai has quantities of natural gas, and the Tarim basin holds both oil and gas.
An earthquake in April that struck a main producing area in Qinghai province is part of the reason, traders say.
